[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10011011 5
1 00000001 1
2 01010111 5
3 11010110 5
4 10010111 5
5 01001011 4
6 00000000 a
7 01110011 5
